docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,317.20 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORELLANA CASTRO, JOSE FIDEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MELANIE BETTIS, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-02-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MELANIE BETTIS SR. ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
